data.method: How would you like to add a device?

distribute.title: Install Agent

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: Enter the URL and optional Bearer token for the Desk2HA agent.

install_scan.title: Discovered Hosts
install_scan.description: Found {count} machines on your network. Select a host to install the agent, or choose manual entry.

install_choose_os.title: Remote Installation
install_choose_os.description: Select the operating system of the target machine where the agent will be installed.

install_ssh.title: Install via SSH
install_ssh.description: The agent will be installed remotely via SSH. Python 3.11+ must be available on the target machine.

install_winrm.title: Install via WinRM
install_winrm.description: The agent will be installed remotely via Windows Remote Management. WinRM must be enabled on the target machine.

install_complete.title: Installation Complete
install_complete.description: The agent has been installed and started successfully.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Desk2HA Agent Discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: A Desk2HA agent was found at {name}. Enter the Bearer token to connect.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Desk2HA agent. Check that the agent is running on the target machine and port 9693 is accessible. Try: curl http://AGENT_IP:9693/v1/health
error.invalid_auth: Invalid Bearer token. The token must match the auth_token value in the agent's config.toml exactly (case-sensitive).
error.install_failed: Remote installation failed. Verify: (1) credentials are correct, (2) Python 3.11+ is installed on the target, (3) SSH/WinRM is enabled and accessible.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details (Settings > System > Logs).

abort.already_configured: This device is already configured. To reconfigure, remove the existing entry first.
abort.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the discovered agent. Ensure it is still running and the firewall allows port 9693.
abort.install_failed: Remote installation failed. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
abort.install_server_unavailable: Install server not ready. Please reload the Desk2HA integration (Settings > Devices > Desk2HA > ... > Reload).

data.fetch_product_images: Fetch product images from manufacturer websites
